title: Dark Mode GUI - Heycronus
description: Dark GUI is a texture pack that makes the Minecraft interface much darker and more comfortable to use, especially in low-light or nighttime environments
body:
![Dark Mode](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ca27c3616aac85de26248856b4f01cf69e7e3ff.png)

🌑 Dark GUI - Texture Pack

Dark GUI is a texture pack that makes the Minecraft interface much darker and more comfortable to use, especially in low-light or nighttime environments. Perfect for players who enjoy a more elegant, minimalist, and eye-friendly look.

With Dark GUI, you can enjoy a redesigned and darker interface across several Minecraft screens, including the Crafting Table, Chests, Enchanting Table, Furnace, and more. This pack offers a modern and less tiring visual experience, ideal for long gaming sessions or for those who simply prefer a darker aesthetic.

Give your Minecraft a stylish and sophisticated dark look—without changing the gameplay!
